final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of a ByteDance employee ID badge, showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic studio product photography, clean white or light grey background, sharp focus throughout
Composition: two badges laid flat or slightly angled side by side — front face on the left, back face on the right — top-down or slight 15° overhead angle, 50mm macro lens
Subject: corporate employee ID badge for ByteDance; front side features the ByteDance logo, a placeholder employee photo portrait, employee name, department, and employee ID number printed in clean sans-serif type; back side features a magnetic stripe or barcode/QR code, company address or policy text, and a clip or lanyard hole at the top
Scene/backdrop: neutral light grey seamless surface, minimal shadow beneath each badge
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead studio light, subtle shadow on one side to convey depth and physicality, clean and corporate
Color palette: white badge base with ByteDance brand colors (black and orange accent) as primary; muted grey background to keep focus on the badge
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface with slight specular highlight, visible edge thickness, lanyard slot detail
Avoid: cartoon style, illustrated look, floating badges without surface, distorted text, blurry details, generic placeholder badge design unrelated to ByteDance
